entries.claim: The 62-assertion desktop/mobile Assistant observation remains applicable because UI source is unchanged in the refreeze tree.
entries.command: jq -e '.result == "pass" and .implementation_commit == "54374b8fd121832238e2ad2f7dd8df67945ba67c" and .ui_observation_reused and .current_tree_ui_source_unchanged and .assertions_passed == 62 and .assertions_failed == 0' docs/evidence/artifacts/issue-628/pre-rc/ui-smoke.json

entries.claim: Real Claude and ChatGPT read-only StoreArchive observations remain applicable because provider OAuth, harness, StoreArchive, and turn source are unchanged in the refreeze tree.
entries.command: jq -e '.result == "pass" and .implementation_commit == "54374b8fd121832238e2ad2f7dd8df67945ba67c" and .live_observation_commit == "a2b42aa83e83afeb09fc47d88c29c9b2f8a3c53d" and .live_observation_reused and .claude.read_only_storearchive_turn == "complete" and .claude.source_count_observed >= 1 and .claude.error_count == 0 and .claude.pending_actions == 0 and .codex.read_only_storearchive_turn == "complete" and .codex.source_count_observed >= 1 and .codex.error_count == 0 and .codex.pending_actions == 0 and .local_cli_origin_used == false and .account_identity_included == false' docs/evidence/artifacts/issue-628/pre-rc/provider-harness-matrix.json

entries.claim: The exact refreeze commit produces and marker-scans a clean default APK, while the earlier physical reinstall remains separately pinned and the protected exact-tree emulator passes.
entries.command: test "$(sha256sum /tmp/issue-628-default-54374b8.apk | cut -d' ' -f1)" = "e07599cef819445921314b5687c744f27b12785e97161366f412a779a9c2c698" && python3 tools/verify-agent-network-boundary.py --root . --default-apk /tmp/issue-628-default-54374b8.apk --hook-apk /tmp/issue-628-hooks-a2b42aa.apk --output /tmp/issue-628-network-boundary-54374b8.json && python3 tools/verify-agent-account-lifecycle-boundary.py --root . --default-apk /tmp/issue-628-default-54374b8.apk --hook-apk /tmp/issue-628-hooks-a2b42aa.apk --output /tmp/issue-628-lifecycle-boundary-54374b8.json && jq -e '.implementation_commit == "54374b8fd121832238e2ad2f7dd8df67945ba67c" and .exact_tree_build == "pass" and .exact_tree_boundary_scans == "pass" and .exact_tree_protected_emulator_smoke == "pass" and .physical_observation_reused' docs/evidence/artifacts/issue-628/pre-rc/default-apk-matrix.json

entries.claim: The separately pinned hook APK exposes only bounded test controls; hook-control source is unchanged in the refreeze tree and the artifact is never used as product evidence.
entries.command: (cd android && ISY_CARGO_FEATURES=agent-account-lifecycle-device-test-hooks,agent-credential-store-self-test,agent-network-device-test-hooks,mobile-job-device-test-hooks ./gradlew :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=com.silentspike.isyncyou.AgentCredentialKeyStoreInstrumentedTest,com.silentspike.isyncyou.MobileJobWorkerInstrumentedTest,com.silentspike.isyncyou.NetworkPreflightHookInstrumentedTest,com.silentspike.isyncyou.AgentAccountLifecycleHookInstrumentedTest)

entries.command: jq -e '.dependencies["627"].ancestor and .dependencies["639"].ancestor and .dependencies["640"].ancestor and .dependencies["645"].ancestor and .historical_manifest_readback.current_tests_present_and_passed and .blocking_feature_pull_requests == 0' docs/evidence/artifacts/issue-628/pre-rc/dependency-and-scope.json

entries.claim: The release workflow accepts only exact stable SemVer tags for the stable path.

entries.claim: The exact refreeze tree passes every changed-scope pairing, Android, policy, traceability, secret, protected static-analysis, staging, and main gate; unchanged full-matrix and physical observations remain explicitly pinned.
entries.command: python3 tools/check_traceability.py && gitleaks git --redact --no-banner --log-opts=origin/dev..HEAD && docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/src -w /src semgrep/semgrep@sha256:a265d09a9ca712e6624aca09056304ce4314a695b7028d65c041dd53fd44c700 semgrep scan --config p/javascript --config p/kotlin --config p/secrets --config p/security-audit --error --metrics=off gui/webui android
